items: Today: Arsenal vs Bournemouth (H) at 7:30 AM in 9h • Emirates Stadium, London Premier League | Matchweek 32 | Watch live on TalkSport, UK - TNT Sports. Join us for analysis and live commentary in The Breakdown Live on the Arsenal App and Arsenal.com | Join In #ARSBOU Shop Arsenal Direct Join Membe

[Arseblog] Arteta confirms Eze return and provides Merino update Mikel Arteta has confirmed that Eberechi Eze will be available for Saturday’s game against Bournemouth, having returned to full training after missing the last three games. The England international picked up a lower leg

Fitness watch: Odegaard/Trossard availability is in the official pre-match signal set, so that is real team-news rather than fluff.
Manager line: Arteta is part of the pre-match cycle, which usually means the section to trust most is availability plus selection hints, not fan noise.
Selection question: The module still refuses to fake a probable XI. The real watchpoints are the Odegaard/Trossard fitness picture and how aggressive Arteta goes before the next run of fixtures.
Signal policy: Kept intentionally strict. When this section is populated, it should only surface official Arsenal output or converged reporter signals — not random rumor sludge.
